sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD OR A NUMBER.
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.content: The idea for the two new developments in the city came from
options: A local people
B the City Council
C the SWRDC

questions.content: What is unusual about Brackenside pool?
options: A its architectural style
B its heating system
C its method of water treatment

questions.content: Local newspapers have raised worries about
options: A the late opening date
B the post of the project
C the size of the facilities

questions.content: What decision has not yet been made about the pool?
options: A whose statue will be at the door
B the exact opening times
C who will open it

sections.instruction: Which feature is related to each of the following areas of the world represented in the playground? Choose SIX answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-I, next to questions 15-20.
sections.passage_or_context: Areas of the world represented in the playground

questions.content: Which TWO hobbies was Thor Heyerdahl very interested in as a youth?
options: A camping
B climbing
C collecting
D hunting
E reading

questions.content: Which do the speakers say are the TWO reasons why Heyerdahl went to live on an island?
options: A to examine ancient carvings
B to experience an isolated place
C to formulate a new theory
D to learn survival skills
E to study the impact of an extreme environment

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
sections.passage_or_context: The later life of Thor Heyerdahl

questions.content: According to Victor and Olivia, academics thought that Polynesian migration from the east was impossible due to
options: A the fact that Eastern countries were far away
B the lack of materials for boat building
C the direction of the winds and currents

questions.content: Which do the speakers agree was the main reason for Heyerdahl’s raft journey?
options: A to overcome a research setback
B to demonstrate a personal quality
C to test a new theory

questions.content: What was most important to Heyerdahl about his raft journey?
options: A the fact that he was the first person to do it
B the speed of crossing the Pacific
C the use of authentic construction methods

questions.content: Why did Heyerdahl go to Easter Island?
options: A to build a stone statue
B to sail a reed boat
C to learn the local language

questions.content: In Olivia’s opinion, Heyerdahl’s greatest influence was on
options: A theories about Polynesian origins
B the development of archaeological methodology
C establishing archaeology as an academic subject

questions.content: Which criticism do the speakers make of William Oliver’s textbook?
options: A Its style is out of date
B Its content is over-simplified
C Its methodology is flawed

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD ONLY.

questions.content:
THE FUTURE OF MANAGEMENT
Business markets
• greater (31) {{BLANK}} among companies
• increase in power of large (32) {{BLANK}} companies
• rising (33) {{BLANK}} in certain countries
External influences on businesses
• more discussion with (34) {{BLANK}} before making business decisions
• environmental concerns which may lead to more (35) {{BLANK}}
Business structures
• more teams will be formed to work on a particular (36) {{BLANK}}
• businesses may need to offer hours that are (37) {{BLANK}}, or the chance to work remotely
Management styles
• increasing need for managers to provide good (38) {{BLANK}}
• changes influenced by (39) {{BLANK}} taking senior roles
Changes in the economy
• service sector continues to be important
• increasing value of intellectual property
• more and more (40) {{BLANK}} workers
